div.h2: Hardware Soul: Page Cache & Read Latency Tiers
div.p: read(file_fd, read_buf, 65536) — Where Are Your Bytes?
Copy Count · read() = 1 copy: page cache → read_buf · send() = 1 copy: read_buf → NIC buffer · Total = 2 copies (use sendfile() to reduce to 0)
Kernel Readahead Sequential access detected → prefetch next 128 KB – 512 KB before your next read() call. Effective latency → ~0 for sustained sequential reads.

text.tspan: 32 KB L1 / 256 KB L2 per core
File data in kernel page cache
